settings.title: Women’s Bikinis That Flatter, Move & Stay On
settings.text:
Our women’s bikinis are made for those who live for the water - designed to sculpt, support, and stay secure no matter where the waves take you. Combining flattering fits with eco-luxury design, every bikini is crafted from premium Italian recycled fabric that feels like a second skin and lasts season after season.

Whether you prefer the classic confidence of a triangle bikini, the modern edge of a one shoulder bikini, or the athletic performance of a surf bikini, every piece in this collection blends form, function, and timeless beauty.

Each bikini offers UPF 50+ sun protection, is resistant to salt and chlorine, and made with double-lined, seamless construction for comfort and coverage that moves with you. With high waisted bikinis for sculpting and shaping or low rise bikinis for a minimal, laid-back fit, there’s a style that supports every woman’s rhythm - in and out of the ocean.

Pair your bikini top with coordinating bottoms or mix and match across our styles for a look that’s uniquely yours. From beach to bar, pool to paddleboard, these are bikinis designed to stay on, flatter your form, and move with your life.

Every piece is ethically handmade in Bali using eco-friendly regenerated fibres - because true beauty doesn’t compromise sustainability.

settings.title: Stylish favourite for surfing
settings.text: "The fit and cut is so flattering, and the material is so soft. The strings don’t “cut” in like other similar bikinis."
settings.author: Catherine

settings.subheading_text:
Designed to Move With You.

Our bikinis aren’t made for lounging only - they’re made for life. Sculpting Support: Each bikini is double-lined for durability and shape.
Seamless Finish: No pinching or digging, just smooth comfort.
Versatile Style: Mix and match tops and bottoms for endless looks.
Long-Lasting Quality: Resistant to salt, sun, and chlorine for longevity.
From your high waisted bikini bottom to your seamless surf top, every piece is refined through years of design evolution to ensure it fits beautifully and performs effortlessly.

settings.title: Triangle Bikinis
settings.text:
Our triangle bikinis are a timeless favourite for a reason - flattering, versatile, and endlessly wearable. Adjustable ties allow you to customise your fit for sunbathing, swimming, or surfing, while double-lined fabric ensures support and shape retention.

Classic and minimal for a sculpted silhouette

Adjustable ties for the perfect fit

Mix and match with any bikini bottom

settings.title: One Shoulder Bikinis
settings.text:
Sleek, sculpting, and effortlessly chic, our one shoulder bikinis are made for women who want a statement silhouette with functional support. The asymmetrical design flatters the shoulders and adds elegance to every movement.

Asymmetric design for a refined look

Soft recycled fabric with UPF 50+ protection

Available in timeless black, classic white and modern pink

settings.title: High Waisted Bikinis
settings.text:
Our high waisted bikinis redefine comfort and confidence. Designed to smooth and support through the waist and hips, this cut elongates the legs and enhances your natural shape.

Sculpting waistband that stays put

Soft compression for a flattering fit

Double-lined for comfort and coverage

settings.title: Low Rise Bikinis
settings.text:
For those who love minimal coverage and maximum freedom, our low rise bikinis sit effortlessly on the hips for a relaxed, flattering fit.

Comfortable, second-skin feel

Seamless design to prevent digging

Ideal for tanning and beach days

settings.title: Surf Bikinis
settings.text:
Active days demand swimwear that performs. Our surf bikinis are designed to stay secure during movement while maintaining a sleek, feminine shape. Whether you’re paddling out or chasing waves, these bikinis won’t ride up or slip down.

Secure fit for surf, SUP, and swim

Four-way stretch for freedom of movement

Tested by real women in real waves

settings.heading: Sustainability Meets Style
settings.subheading_text:
Every Ocean Soul women’s bikini is made from Econyl® regenerated nylon - crafted from recycled ocean waste like fishing nets and industrial plastics. This luxury Italian fabric feels silky smooth, provides powerful shape retention, and resists fading from salt and sun exposure.

Each piece is ethically handmade in Bali, in small batches to minimise waste and empower local artisans. You’ll feel the difference - not just in the quality, but in the purpose behind every stitch.

settings.title: Shop the Collection
settings.text:
Explore Ocean Soul Women’s Bikinis - a curated collection designed for modern women who love the water and live with intention.

High Waisted Bikinis - sculpting, flattering, and timeless.

Triangle Bikinis - adjustable, classic, and endlessly wearable.

One Shoulder Bikinis - elegant, asymmetrical style that stands out.

Surf Bikinis - supportive, active, and surf-tested.

Low Rise & Seamless Bikinis - minimalist design for ultimate comfort.

Each bikini reflects what Ocean Soul stands for - sustainability, confidence, and effortless coastal luxury.

settings.title: Does the front zip on the cropped rash guard dig in when surfing?
settings.content: Not at all! We have tried and tested all our women's cropped rash guards and they are super comfortable above or below the water!

settings.title: Which two piece bikini is best for surfing?
settings.content: We love all of them! To make sure your suit stays in place, we recommend our cropped rash guards and our mid rise bikini bottoms.

settings.title: Do your rash guards have padding?
settings.content: All our cropped rash guards and full length rash guards are double lined for extra support. They are designed to be a firm fit to hold everything in place so you feel secure.

settings.title: Do your white bikinis and rash guards go transparent when wet?
settings.content: We double line all our seamless bikinis and crop rash guards with beige sustainable econyl fabric to avoid them from going transparent when wet.
